name: e2e-vote-helper
description: Parallel vote helper receives vote context after main tasks finish.

tasks.task: Reply exactly VOTE_SOURCE_A_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly VOTE_SOURCE_B_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.

vote.task: If the Vote Context includes VOTE_SOURCE_A_TOKEN and VOTE_SOURCE_B_TOKEN in output previews, reply exactly E2E_VOTE_OK. Otherwise reply E2E_VOTE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
